nasb.text: Also anything with its testicles bruised or crushed or torn or cut, you shall not offer to the Lord, or sacrifice in your land,

esv.text: Any animal that has its testicles bruised or crushed or torn or cut you shall not offer to the Lord; you shall not do it within your land,

cnv.text: 內臟損傷、壓碎、破裂，或割掉的，你們都不可獻與耶和華；在你們將來居住的地方，你們不可行這樣的事；

ccb.text: 不可献给耶和华睪丸受损、被压碎、破裂或被阉割的牲畜。在你们境内不可做这样的事，
